mapper.sql:
select ci.college , ci.end_date , ci.course_name , ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ci.weekdays , ci1.room_number , ci1.qr_code_path , ci.content , ci1.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.major , ci.course_info_id , ci.time_period , ci.start_date
FROM course_info ci left join classroom_info ci1 on ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci1.classroom_info_id
mapper.select:
select ci.college , ci.end_date , ci.course_name , ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ci.weekdays , ci1.room_number , ci1.qr_code_path , ci.content , ci1.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.major , ci.course_info_id , ci.time_period , ci.start_date
FROM course_info ci left join
classroom_info
ci1 on ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci1.classroom_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
